name: napkin
description: Design, validate, live-test, and visualize a relational data model. The erd-modeler skill turns a natural-language domain description (or an optional glossary) into a clean, normalized DBML model, audits it against best practices, then proves it works by running it against an in-memory Postgres (PGlite) — generating SQL, seed data, and business-use-case queries and looping with fixes until every use-case passes. The manual /erd-diagram command renders an existing DBML model into a self-contained, interactive HTML ER diagram.
